archimate:DataObject.name: Registration Form
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Definition: The Registration Form is used for enrolling users or participants in services, events, or online platforms. It typically requires personal information, such as name, age, contact details, and sometimes specific preferences or qualifications. This form is key for organizing events, managing subscriptions, or registering users for online services, helping businesses maintain organized records of participants and tailor their offerings accordingly.
Interoperability Dimension: Structural IoP
LOST view: SV-Forms Structure
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/RegistrationFormDataObject
ABB name: egovera:RegistrationFormDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/RegistrationFormDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/FormsStructureDataObject

properties.value: The Registration Form is used for enrolling users or participants in services, events, or online platforms. It typically requires personal information, such as name, age, contact details, and sometimes specific preferences or qualifications. This form is key for organizing events, managing subscriptions, or registering users for online services, helping businesses maintain organized records of participants and tailor their offerings accordingly.
